source: Geological Society of London — 100 Great Geosites (Adventurous category)
note: Backfill for sites created under v1 seeder. Run with --backfill. Re-attaches resources as per-site links and adds one Wikimedia photo each. Formations already exist and are not touched. Idempotent.
